User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to create and edit products

So that I can manage all their pricing and non-pricing parameters and their terms of offer, as well as add them to customer contracts

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Check system user permissions to be able to create new Product

    1. Create a Product 

      1. Enable Plus button when user has permission

      2. Disable Plus button when user doesn’t have permission

  2. Clicking on a Plus icon in products listing page will open Product creation page

  3. For creating a new product all mandatory fields in all three tabs should be added 

  4. Default state of Product creation page should contain elements:

    1. Page title: ‘Product’

    2. Tab bar

      1. Basic Settings (Default selected)

      2. Price Settings

      3. Additional Settings

  5. Fields: 

    1. Fields for product creation is described below

    2. Each field has title above the field and no need for placeholder

    3. Should display field with orange border if mandatory for product creation

    4. Should display field with gray border if optional for product creation

    5. Should display field with gray border and gray background if disabled in product creation

  6. Basic Settings - fields and validations: 

    1. Individual Product Checkbox

      1. Optional

      2. Checkbox

    2. Customer Identifier

      1. Text field

      2. Disabled

      3. Enable only if the individual Product checkbox is selected.

    3. Name

      1. Mandatory

      2. Product name should be unique 

      3. Text field

      4. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed  

      5. Length 1-1024 characters

    4. Name (Transliterated)

      1. Mandatory

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed 

      4. Length 1-1024 characters

      5. Is automatically filled while typing Name of legal entity

      6. Always enabled – automatically filled value can be edited

    5. Status

      1. Hardcoded values:

        1. Active

        2. Inactive

        3. If product is inactive than Available for sale is not considered anywhere

    6. Available for sale

      1. Checkbox

      2. If product is active enabled

      3. If product is inactive disabled

      4. If Available from and Available to is not defined it means product version is always available

      5. In Contract creation list of products versions will be filtered by that field 

    7. Available from 

      1. Optional

      2. Disabled if ‘Available for sale’ is not selected

      3. Available from < Available to

    8. Available to 

      1. Optional

      2. Disabled if ‘Available for sale’ is not selected

      3. Available from < Available to

    9. Printing name

      1. Mandatory

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed 

      4. Length 1-1024 characters

    10. Printing name (Transliterated)

      1. Mandatory

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed  

      4. Length 1-1024 characters

      5. Is automatically filled while typing printing name of legal entity 

      6. Always enabled – automatically filled value can be edited

    11. Short description

      1. Mandatory

      2. Text area

      3. All symbols are allowed + NL. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed 

      4. Length: 1-8192 characters

    12. Full description

      1. Optional 

      2. Text area

      3. All symbols are allowed + NL. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed  

      4. Length: 1-32768 characters

    13. Group

      1. Mandatory

      2. Single select dropdown

        1. List is manageable from nomenclature

          1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

          2. Order should be considered 

          3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

          4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

          5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

    14. Group (Transliterated)

      1. Always disabled 

      2. Text field

      3. Mandatory

      4. Automatically filled after selecting ‘Group’ value

    15. Code for connection with other system

      1. Optional

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed 

      4. Length: 1 – 256 characters

      5. Enabled

    16. Product Type

      1. Mandatory

      2. Single select dropdown

        1. List is manageable from nomenclature

          1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

          2. Order should be considered 

          3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

          4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

          5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

    17. Contract Type 

      1. Mandatory to select at least one option

      2. Hardcoded predefined values: 

        1. Combined

        2. Supply and balancing 

        3. Supply only

        4. Without supply 

        5. More than one can be selected and should be chosen only one in contract concluding 

    18. Payment guarantee

      1. Checkbox

      2. Mandatory to select at least one option

      3. Hardcoded predefined values: 

        1. No guarantee

        2. Cash deposit

        3. Bank guarantee

        4. Cash deposit and Bank guarantee

      4. More than one can be selected and should be chosen only one in contract concluding 

      5. Adding new fields in service for predefined Cash deposit amount and Bank guarantee amount

    19. Cash deposit amount

      1. Visible and optional if Cash deposit or Cash deposit and Bank guarantee is selected

      2. Text field

      3. Allowed symbols: only digits and decimal point can be added  0-9

      4. Length: 0.01 - 99999999.99

    20. Bank guarantee amount

      1. Visible and optional if Bank guarantee or Cash deposit and Bank guarantee is selected

      2. Text field

      3. Allowed symbols: only digits and decimal point can be added  0-9

      4. Length: 0.01 - 99999999.99

    21. Currency

      1. Visible if Cash deposit or Bank guarantee or Cash deposit and Bank guarantee is selected

      2. Mandatory if amount is added

      3. Optional if amount is not added

      4. Single select dropdown

        1. List is manageable from nomenclature

        2. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        3. Order should be considered

        4. Display default if returned from nomenclature

      5. If Cash deposit amount or Bank guarantee amount is added in a product. the amount should be automatically filled in the contract without option for change.

    22. Type of points of delivery

      1. Mandatory to select at least one option

      2. Hardcoded predefined values: 

        1. Consumer

        2. Generator

      3. Both types can be selected and contract can be concluded with selected types of PODs

    23. Purpose of consumption 

      1. Mandatory to select at least one option

      2. Hardcoded predefined values: 

        1. Household

        2. Non-household

      3. Both types can be selected and contract can be concluded with selected types of PODs

    24. Metering type of the points of delivery

      1. Mandatory to select at least one option

      2. Hardcoded predefined values:

        1. By settlement periods

        2. SLP (Standard Load Profiles)

      3. Both types can be selected and contract can be concluded with selected types of PODs

    25. Voltage level

      1. Mandatory to select at least one option 

      2. Hardcoded predefined values:

        1. Low 

        2. Medium

        3. Medium - direct connected

        4. High

      3. More than one can be selected and contract can be concluded with selected types of PODs

      4. In contract creation should be checked if Points of Delivery has the same voltage level type which is configured in product; if not do not allow to conclude contract with irrelevant Points of Delivery

    26. Provided Capacity limit

      1. Type

        1. Mandatory, if amount is added, if amount is not added empty and disabled

        2. Single Select dropdown with predefined hardcoded values:

        3. From (ÐÑ)

        4. To (ÐÐ¾)

      2. Amount

        1. Optional

        2. Text field

        3. Only digits can be added in 1-9999 range

        4. Length: 4 characters 

    27. Grid Operator

      1. Mandatory to select at least one option 

      2. Multi Select dropdown

      3. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        2. Order should be considered

        3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

        4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

        5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

        6. More than one can be selected and contract can be concluded with selected types of PODs

        7. All option - Selecting All option means always to use all values from nomenclature which are added for that time

    28. Text to show in invoices and templates

      1. Optional

      2. Text area

      3. All symbols are allowed + NL. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed  

      4. Length: 1-2048 characters

    29. Text to show in invoices and templates (Transliteration)

      1. Optional

      2. Text area

      3. All symbols are allowed + NL. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed  

      4. Length: 1-2048 characters

        1. Is automatically filled while typing Text to show in invoice and templates

      5. Always enabled – automatically filled value can be edited

    30. Number of income account

      1. Mandatory

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

      4. Length: 1 – 32 characters

      5. Enabled

        1. If the price component does not have a value, then the value from Product level will be used.

        2. If the price component has a value, then the Product level will be ignored (lower level is priority.

    31. Cost center / Controlling order

      1. Mandatory

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

      4. Length: 1 – 32 characters

      5. Enabled

        1. If the price component does not have a value, then the value from Product level will be used.

        2. If the price component has a value, then the Product level will be ignored (lower level is priority.

    32. VAT rate

      1. Mandatory

      2. Single Select dropdown

      3. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        2. The default value selected in dropdown should be hardcoded ‘Global VAT rate’

          1. If Global VAT rate is not set in nomenclature, than default will not be selected

          2. Selecting 'Global VAT rate' option means always to use Global VAT rate which is valid for certain date. (if Global VAT rate is changed in nomenclatures and other nomenclature item becomes valid after certain date, changes will automatically be reflected)

          3. Selecting specific value from dropdown list (not hardcoded - Global VAT rate option) it means that selected value should always be used

        3. e.g. nomenclature list contains values with following order:

          1. VAT RATE 1 (Global VAT Rate checkbox is selected with end date 17th February)

          2. VAT RATE 2 (Global VAT Rate checkbox is selected with start date –18th February)

          3. VAT RATE 3

          4. VAT RATE 4

        4. In dropdown user should see:

          1. Global VAT Rate (By default selected)

          2. VAT RATE 1

          3. VAT RATE 2

          4. VAT RATE 3

          5. VAT RATE 4

        5. If product is connected to – Global VAT rate, than on 18th February in calculations value taken from VAT RATE 2 will be used

        6. If product is connected to VAT RATE 1, than on 18th February goods will still use VAT RATE 1 value in calculations.

    33. Sales channels

      1. Mandatory to select at least one option 

      2. Multi Select dropdown

      3. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        2. Order should be considered

        3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

        4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

        5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

        6. All option - Selecting All option means always to use all values from nomenclature which are added for that time

  7. Sales areas

    1. Mandatory to select at least one option 

    2. Multi Select dropdown

    3. List is manageable from nomenclature

      1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

      2. Order should be considered

      3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

      4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

      5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

      6. All option - Selecting All option means always to use all values from nomenclature which are added for that time

  8. Segment

    1. Mandatory to select at least one option 

    2. Multi Select dropdown

    3. Existing nomenclature (Used in customer creation)

    4. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

    5. Order should be considered

    6. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

    7. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

    8. Display default if returned from nomenclature

    9. More than one can be selected and contract can be concluded with customers with selected segments

Contract Term

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to create and edit Contract Term

So that I can create and manage contract term in the product

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Mandatory to add this sub-object

  2. Contract Term is a sub-object of Product/Service object and always exists under certain product/service version

  3. At least one contract term should be created while creating new Product

  4. Values to be added in contract term creation:

    1. Type of terms:

      1. Single select dropdown with predefined meanings:

        1. Period

        2. Certain Date

        3. Without term

        4. Other

      2. Period

        1. Value

          1. Active

          2. Text field

          3. Mandatory if Period selected

          4. Only digits can be typed in 1-9999 range

          5. Length: max 4 characters

        2. Type

          1. Active

          2. Mandatory if Period selected

          3. Single select dropdown with predefined values:

            1. Day/days (Ð´ÐµÐ½/Ð´Ð½Ð¸)

            2. Month/months (Ð¼ÐµÑÐµÑ/Ð¼ÐµÑÐµÑÐ¸)

            3. Year/years (Ð³Ð¾Ð´Ð¸Ð½Ð°/Ð³Ð¾Ð´Ð¸Ð½Ð¸)

        3. Certain Date

          1. In contract will be defined exact date

          2. Value and type will be disabled and will not be used

        4. Without term

          1. The contract has no term and it is in perpetuity from the beginning

          2. Value and type will be disabled and will not be used

        5. Other

          1. The end date of the contract is tied to events outside the system and it is unknown until the user start manually contract termination process and enters the end date manually.

          2. Value and type will be disabled and will not be used

    2. Perpetuity clause

      1. Unselected by default

      2. Contract will not be terminated when the initial term expires, will continue issue invoices and etc. Contract can be terminated manually or automatically but not based on the initial term

    3. Automatic renewal

      1. New checkbox should be created – Automatic renewal.

        1. Enabled only if Type of terms is Period.

        2. Disabled and empty if Type of terms is different from Period

      2. Number of renewals.

        1. Not mandatory.

        2. Text field

        3. Accepts only numbers between 1 and 999 without decimal.

        4. Enabled only if Automatic renewal is selected.

        5. Disabled and empty if Automatic renewal is not selected.

      3. Renewal Value

        1. Active

        2. Text field

        3. Mandatory

        4. Disabled and empty if Automatic renewal is not selected.

        5. Only digits can be typed in 1-9999 range

        6. Length: max 4 characters

      4. Renewal Period type

        1. Active

        2. Mandatory

        3. Disabled and empty if Automatic renewal is not selected.

        4. Single select dropdown with predefined values:

          1. Day/days (Ð´ÐµÐ½/Ð´Ð½Ð¸)

          2. Month/months (Ð¼ÐµÑÐµÑ/Ð¼ÐµÑÐµÑÐ¸)

          3. Year/years (Ð³Ð¾Ð´Ð¸Ð½Ð°/Ð³Ð¾Ð´Ð¸Ð½Ð¸)

    4. The fields Renewal period value and Renewal period type are enabled and mandatory if the Automatic renewal checkbox is marked and are empty and disabled if the Automatic renewal checkbox is not marked. In the automatic renewal process parameters for the renewal period should be taken from fields Renewal period value and Renewal period type

    5. After the Automatic renewal amount is defined and the checkbox is selected, system should display its information after adding the contract term sub-object in Product.

      Format: 250 Months/months period (Perpetuity clause, Automatic renewal (20)) OR 6 Days/days period (Perpetuity clause, Automatic renewal (20)) OR 1 Year/year period (Perpetuity clause, , Automatic renewal (20))

  5. Clicking on Ok button will check validations (frontend side only)

    1. Will display error messages if doesn’t match validations

    2. If all validations are successful will close pop-up and display in product page newly added contract term with following structure:

      1. Period value, type (Perpetuity clause selected, Automatic renewal if selected)

  6. e.g. 15 Months Period (Automatic renewal )

    1. Certain date (Perpetuity clause selected, Automatic renewal selected)

  7. e.g. Certain Date (Perpetuity clause)

    1. If Without term is selected

      1. e.g. Without term (Perpetuity clause, Automatic renewal )

    2. If Other is selected

      1. e.g. Other (Perpetuity clause, Automatic renewal )

    3. if some fields in contract term are edited and try to close the main object without saving the warning message should appear

      1. ‘Your changes are not saved, are you sure you want to cancel?’ No, Yes

      2. No - will close warning Pop-up and return to contract term page

      3. Yes – will close Contract term Pop-up and return to product page

      4.  Warning messages should be managed via system messages configuration

  8. Clicking on Cancel button or ‘X’ button

    1. check changes and if there are changes made then Warning Pop-up message comes out with buttons

    2. ‘Your changes are not saved, are you sure you want to cancel?’ No, Yes

    3. No - will close warning Pop-up and return to contract term page

    4. Yes – will close Contract term Pop-up and return to product page

    5. Warning messages should be managed via system messages configuration

Group of terms

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add Group of Terms

So that I can create and manage group of terms in the product

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Clicking on a plus button in Terms group section will open Modal window for adding a new terms group

  2. In Modal window will be displayed dropdown to choose available terms group. List of terms groups should be filtered by following logic:

    1. All terms groups should be retrieved (terms group can be added to more than one object so in product there is no need to filter

    2. deleted terms shouldn’t be retrieved

    3. Should display Group of terms name (Currently active version’s name) and ID (unique identifier of Group of terms – for all Group of terms versions will be the same)

    4. Order of Group of terms should be ID DESC

    5. Will be possible to search in dropdown by Group of terms name and ID

      1. In all versions of names will run search and return Currently active version name  

    6. Clicking on a plus button in Modal window will open term creation page in a new page

      1. In pop-up window dropdown list will always show updated list of terms, so last created terms will be listed first after closing dropdown and re-clicking on it

    7. After Selecting terms in Pop-up window and clicking on ‘OK’ button will close pop-up window and selected terms should be listed in product creation page 

      1. Should display terms name in terms section

    8. It is mandatory to add only one term or only one group of terms

      1. If term is already added then plus button in group of terms section should be disabled

      2. if group of term is added then plus button in terms section should be disabled

      3. If user tries to save product without adding one of them both fields should become red; after filling one them the other should become red

Terms

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add Terms in the product

So that I can create and manage group of terms in the product

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Clicking on a plus button in Terms section will open Modal window for adding a new term

  2. In Modal window will be displayed dropdown to choose available term. List of terms should be filtered by following logic:

    1. Available terms means that term is not connected to any object in the system (Product/service/group of terms)

    2. deleted terms shouldn’t be retrieved

    3. List of terms in dropdown will be sorted by creation date (last created term will be listed first)

    4. In modal window in Terms dropdown will be possible to search term by term name and ID

    5. Clicking on a plus button in Modal window will open term creation page in a new page

      1. In pop-up window dropdown list will always show updated list of terms, so last created terms will be listed first after closing dropdown and re-clicking on it

    6. After Selecting terms in Pop-up window and clicking on ‘OK’ button will close pop-up window and selected terms should be listed in product creation page 

      1. Should display terms name in terms section

    7. It is mandatory to add only one term or only one group of terms

      1. If term is already added then plus button in group of terms section should be disabled

      2. if group of term is added then plus button in terms section should be disabled

      3. If user tries to save product without adding one of them both fields should become red; after filling one them the other should become red

Group of interim and advance payment

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add Group of interim and advance payment

So that I can create and manage group of interim and advance payment

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Clicking on a plus button in Group of interim and advance payments group section will open Modal window for adding a new group of interim and advance payments group 

  2. Group of interim and advance payments group is optional sub-object  

  3. More than one group of interim and advance payments group can be added

  4. In Modal window will be displayed dropdown to choose available group of interim and advance payments group. List of group of interim and advance payments groups should be filtered by following logic:

    1. All group of interim and advance payments groups should be retrieved (group of interim and advance payments group can be added to more than one object so in product there is no need to filter

    2. deleted group of interim and advance payments shouldn’t be retrieved

    3. Should display Group of interim and advance payments group name (Currently active version’s name) and ID (unique identifier of Group of interim and advance payments group – for all Group of interim and advance payments group versions will be the same) 

    4. Order of Group of interim and advance payments group should be ID DESC 

    5. Will be possible to search in dropdown by Group of interim and advance payments group name and ID 

      1. In all versions of names will run search and return Currently active version name   

    6. Clicking on a plus button in Modal window will open group of interim and advance payments creation page in a new page

      1. In pop-up window dropdown list will always show updated list of group of interim and advance payments, so last created group of interim and advance payments will be listed first after closing dropdown and re-clicking on it

    7. After Selecting group of interim and advance payments in Pop-up window and clicking on ‘OK’ button will close pop-up window and selected group of interim and advance payments should be listed in product creation page  

      1. Should display group of interim and advance payments name in group of interim and advance payments section

Interim advance payment

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add interim and advance payment

So that I can create and manage group of interim and advance payment

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Clicking on a plus button in Interim and advance payment section will open Modal window for adding a new interim and advance payment

  2. Interim and advance payment is optional sub-object

  3. More than one interim and advance payment can be added

  4. In Modal window a dropdown will be displayed to choose available interim and advance payments. List of interim and advance payments should be filtered by following logic:

    1. Available interim and advance payment means that interim and advance payment is not connected to any object in the system (Product/service/group of interim and advance payment)

    2. deleted interim and advance payment shouldn’t be retrieved

    3. List of interim and advance payments in dropdown will be sorted by creation date (last created interim and advance payment will be listed first)

    4. In modal window in Interim and advance payment dropdown will be possible to search interim and advance payment by interim and advance payment name and ID

    5. Clicking on a plus button in Modal window will open interim and advance payment creation page in a new page

  5. In pop-up window dropdown list will always show updated list of interim and advance payment, so last created interim and advance payment will be listed first after closing dropdown and re-clicking on it

    1. After Selecting interim and advance payment in Pop-up window and clicking on ‘OK’ button will close pop-up window and selected interim and advance payment should be listed in product creation page  

  6. Should display interim and advance payment name in interim and advance payment section

Related Product

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add related product

So that I can create and manage Related product

Acceptance Criteria

  1. On Product/Service can be added related products. it means that it is mandatory to conclude a contract with added related product first and than conclude a contract to this product

  2. Values To be added

    1. Obligatory

      1. Radio button

      2. Mandatory

      3. Hardcoded values

        1. Obligatory condition

          1. If selected when concluding contract it is mandatory customer to have concluded contract to this product

        2. At least one condition

          1. If selected when concluding contract it is mandatory customer to have concluded contract to at least one of added related products with this setting;

      4. e.g If Product 1 has 10 related products from where 5 is marked to 'Obligatory condition' and 5 has selected 'at least one condition' customer should have concluded 6 contracts to related products (5 for the five products with “Obligatory condition” and 1 for any of the other five products with “at least one condition”) and only in this case will be able to conclude a contract with this product

    2. Product/service

      1. Single Select Dropdown

      2. List of Products and Services

        1. Latest version of Products will be listed in the dropdown;

        2. Only active/inactive products and services are returned (Deleted products shouldn’t be retrieved)

        3. Order should be alphabetical

        4. Format should be Type and name separated with dash:

          1. Product - Fix Product

          2. Service - SMS notification

        5. Connection between product version and related product should be ID based

        6. to be able to search in dropdown with Product name, search should run in all versions and will return latest product version

        7. Do not display the product for which I am adding related product in the dropdown list

    3. Allows sales under

      1. Mandatory

      2. Radio button

      3. Hardcoded values:

        1. Concluded contract

          1. Contract should be concluded only; No need it to be activated

        2. Activated contract

          1. Contract should be concluded and activated

  3. Clicking on Ok button will check validations (frontend side only)

    1. Will display error messages if doesn’t match validations

    2. If all validations are successful will close pop-up and display in product page newly added related product with following structure:

      1. Related product name

      2. Selected value from ‘Allow sales under’

      3. e.g. SMS notification (Concluded contract) or SMS notification (Activated contract)

      4. if some fields in related products are edited and try to close the main object without saving the warning message should appear

    3. Connection between product and related product is version to ID based

  4. Clicking on Cancel button or ‘X’ button

    1. check changes and if there are changes made then Warning Pop-up message comes out with buttons

      1. ‘Your changes are not saved, are you sure you want to cancel?’ No, Yes

      2. No - will close warning Pop-up and return to product page

      3. Yes – will close Related Product Pop-up and return to product page

      2. Price Settings

      3. Additional Settings

  5. Fields:

    2. Each field has title above the field and no need for placeholder

    3. Should display field with orange border if mandatory for product creation

    4. Should display field with gray border if optional for product creation

    5. Should display field with gray border and gray background if disabled in product creation

 

Basic Settings - fields and validations:

    2. Single Select nomenclature

      1. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        2. Order should be considered 

        3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

        4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

        5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

  2. Equal monthly installments Activation

    1. Checkbox

Group of terms

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add Group of Terms

So that I can create and manage group of terms in the product

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Clicking on a plus button in Terms group section will open Modal window for adding a new terms group

  2. In Modal window will be displayed dropdown to choose available terms group. List of terms groups should be filtered by following logic:

    1. All terms groups should be retrieved (terms group can be added to more than one object so in product there is no need to filter

    2. deleted terms shouldn’t be retrieved

    3. Should display Group of terms name (Currently active version’s name) and ID (unique identifier of Group of terms – for all Group of terms versions will be the same)

    4. Order of Group of terms should be ID DESC

    5. Will be possible to search in dropdown by Group of terms name and ID

      1. In all versions of names will run search and return Currently active version name  

    6. Clicking on a plus button in Modal window will open term creation page in a new page

      1. In pop-up window dropdown list will always show updated list of terms, so last created terms will be listed first after closing dropdown and re-clicking on it

    7. After Selecting terms in Pop-up window and clicking on ‘OK’ button will close pop-up window and selected terms should be listed in product creation page 

      1. Should display terms name in terms section

    8. It is mandatory to add only one term or only one group of terms

      1. If term is already added then plus button in group of terms section should be disabled

      2. if group of term is added then plus button in terms section should be disabled

      3. If user tries to save product without adding one of them both fields should become red; after filling one them the other should become red

Related Product

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add related product

So that I can create and manage Related product

Acceptance Criteria

  1. On Product/Service can be added related products. it means that it is mandatory to conclude a contract with added related product first and than conclude a contract to this product

  2. Values To be added

    1. Obligatory

      1. Radio button

      2. Mandatory

      3. Hardcoded values

        1. Obligatory condition

          1. If selected when concluding contract it is mandatory customer to have concluded contract to this product

        2. At least one condition

          1. If selected when concluding contract it is mandatory customer to have concluded contract to at least one of added related products with this setting;

      4. e.g If Product 1 has 10 related products from where 5 is marked to 'Obligatory condition' and 5 has selected 'at least one condition' customer should have concluded 6 contracts to related products (5 for the five products with “Obligatory condition” and 1 for any of the other five products with “at least one condition”) and only in this case will be able to conclude a contract with this product

    2. Product/service

      1. Single Select Dropdown

      2. List of Products and Services

        1. Latest version of Products will be listed in the dropdown;

        2. Only active/inactive products and services are returned (Deleted products shouldn’t be retrieved)

        3. Order should be alphabetical

        4. Format should be Type and name separated with dash:

          1. Product - Fix Product

          2. Service - SMS notification

        5. Connection between product version and related product should be ID based

        6. to be able to search in dropdown with Product name, search should run in all versions and will return latest product version

        7. Do not display the product for which I am adding related product in the dropdown list

    3. Allows sales under

      1. Mandatory

      2. Radio button

      3. Hardcoded values:

        1. Concluded contract

          1. Contract should be concluded only; No need it to be activated

        2. Activated contract

          1. Contract should be concluded and activated

  3. Clicking on Ok button will check validations (frontend side only)

    1. Will display error messages if doesn’t match validations

    2. If all validations are successful will close pop-up and display in product page newly added related product with following structure:

      1. Related product name

      2. Selected value from ‘Allow sales under’

      3. e.g. SMS notification (Concluded contract) or SMS notification (Activated contract)

      4. if some fields in related products are edited and try to close the main object without saving the warning message should appear

    3. Connection between product and related product is version to ID based

  4. Clicking on Cancel button or ‘X’ button

    1. check changes and if there are changes made then Warning Pop-up message comes out with buttons

      1. ‘Your changes are not saved, are you sure you want to cancel?’ No, Yes

      2. No - will close warning Pop-up and return to product page

      3. Yes – will close Related Product Pop-up and return to product page

    1. Checkbox

    1. Number

      1. Optional

      5. Length: 4 digits, 1-9999

      6. it is possible to add exact value or range:

      1. Optional

      2. Text field

      3. Only digits can be added

      4. negative values and zero are not allowed can’t be added, should be a valid number

      5. Length: 4 digits, 1-9999

      6. Should be equal or less than Number of installments and less than Number of installments to

    3. Number to

      1. Optional

      2. Text field

      3. Only digits can be added

      4. negative values and zero are not allowed can’t be added, should be a valid number

      5. Length: 4 digits, 1-9999

      6. Should be equal or more than Number of installments and more than Number of installments from

    4. Monthly payment value

      1. Value

        1. Optional 

        2. Text field

        3. Only digits can be added

        4. negative values and zero are not allowed can’t be added, valid decimal number with 2 digits after the decimal point

        5. Length: 15 digits, 0.01-999999999999.99

        6. Should be equal or more than Amount from and equal or less than Amount to 

        7. it is possible to add exact value or range:

          1. if Amount from and Amount to is added Amount should be between them and in contract creation value specified in Amount will be displayed by default and will be possible to update it considering Amount to - Amount from interval

          2. if Amount from and Amount to is not added it means that in contract creation value will be predefined and cannot be changed

          3. If only Amount from is added it means that in contract creation value should be equal or more than defined in ‘Amount from'

          4. If only Amount to is added it means that in contract creation value should be equal or less than defined in ‘Amount to’

          5. if Amount, Amount from, Amount to are not specified it means that in contract creation any value can be added

      2. Value from

        1. Optional 

        2. Text field

        3. Only digits can be added

        4. negative values and zero are not allowed can’t be added, valid decimal number with 2 digits after the decimal point

        5. Length: 15 digits, 0.01-999999999999.99

        6. Should be equal or less than Amount and less than Amount to 

      3. Value to

        1. Optional 

        2. Text field

        3. Only digits can be added

        4. negative values and zero are not allowed can’t be added, valid decimal number with 2 digits after the decimal point

        5. Length: 15 digits, 0.01-999999999999.99

        6. Should be equal or more than Amount and more than Amount from

      4. Currency 

        1. Mandatory 

        2. Single select dropdown 

          1. List is manageable from nomenclature 

          2. Active values will be returned from nomenclature 

          3. Order should be considered  

          4. Display default if returned from nomenclature

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Clicking on a plus button in Penalties group section will open Modal window for adding a new penalties group 

  2. Penalties group is optional sub-object  

  3. More than one penalties group can be added

  4. In Modal window will be displayed dropdown to choose available penalties group. List of penalties groups should be filtered by following logic:

    1. All penalties groups should be retrieved (penalties group can be added to more than one object so in product there is no need to filter

    2. deleted penalties shouldn’t be retrieved

    3. Should display Penalties group name (Currently active version’s name) and ID (unique identifier of Penalties group – for all Penalties group versions will be the same) 

    4. Order of Penalties group should be ID DESC 

    5. Will be possible to search in dropdown by Penalties group name and ID 

    6. In all versions of names will run search and return Currently active version name   

    7. Clicking on a plus button in Modal window will open penalty creation page in a new page

    8. In pop-up window dropdown list will always show updated list of penalties, so last created penalties will be listed first after closing dropdown and re-clicking on it

    9. After Selecting penalties in Pop-up window and clicking on ‘OK’ button will close pop-up window and selected penalties should be listed in product creation page  

    10. Should display penalties name in penalties section

Penalties

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to add penalties

So that I can create and manage penalties

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Clicking on a plus button in Penalty section will open Modal window for adding a new penalty

  2. Penalty is optional sub-object

  3. More than one penalty can be added

  4. In Modal window a dropdown will be displayed to choose available penalty. List of penalty should be filtered by following logic:

    1. Available penalty means that penalty is not connected to any object in the system (Product/service/group of penalty)

    2. deleted penalty shouldn’t be retrieved

    3. List of penalties in dropdown will be sorted by creation date (last created penalty will be listed first)

    4. In modal window in Penalty dropdown will be possible to search penalty by penalty name and ID

    5. Clicking on a plus button in Modal window will open penalty creation page in a new page

    6. In pop-up window dropdown list will always show updated list of penalty, so last created penalty will be listed first after closing dropdown and re-clicking on it

    7. After Selecting penalty in Pop-up window and clicking on ‘OK’ button will close pop-up window and selected penalty should be listed in product creation page  

    8. Should display penalty name in penalty section
